zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前SOL价格位于70.51附近，已跌破20日均线71.77，整体结构偏弱，短线呈震荡下行格局，多头动能不足，反弹持续性有限，市场仍处于修复阶段。

MACD维持轻微负值且信号线未给出，动能指标显示空头占优，RSI缺失但结合价格表现来看，买盘承接力度不足，整体情绪偏谨慎，波动率维持低位收敛。

下方支撑关注70.30一线，若失守可能下探69.80区域；上方阻力在71.05及71.77均线附近，需放量突破才能扭转当前偏弱结构。

操作上以区间思路为主，高抛低吸更稳妥，未有效站稳71.8之前不宜追多，若跌破支撑则应顺势减仓或暂时观望等待新方向确认。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently showing a mild corrective structure after failing to sustain momentum above the 71 level. Price action around 70.51 reflects tight consolidation between 70.33 and 71.05, suggesting indecision and reduced volatility. The broader short-term trend leans slightly bearish as repeated attempts to reclaim the 71.70–72.00 region have weakened. Overall, the market is in a compression phase, often preceding either a volatility expansion or continued downside drift toward lower support zones.

The SMA20 at 71.7745 sits above the current price, reinforcing a bearish short-term bias and indicating that sellers still maintain control over recent trend structure. The MACD reading at -0.0135 confirms fading bullish momentum, even though a signal line value is unavailable for crossover validation. Without RSI data, momentum interpretation relies more heavily on structure and moving averages. The absence of bullish divergence suggests buyers have yet to establish meaningful pressure.

Immediate support is positioned at 70.33, aligning with the recent session low and acting as the first defensive zone for buyers. A breakdown below this level would expose the psychological 70.00 area, followed by deeper support near 69.20, derived from prior consolidation activity. On the upside, resistance is observed at 71.05, with stronger supply clustering around the SMA20 at 71.77. This range remains the key barrier preventing recovery attempts from gaining traction.

Trading conditions currently favor a range-driven approach until a decisive breakout occurs. Short setups may be considered on rejection near 71.00–71.80 with protective stops placed above the SMA20 to limit upside risk. Conversely, long entries could be explored near 70.00–70.30, targeting a mean reversion move back toward the 71.00 region. Given subdued volatility, conservative position sizing and strict confirmation signals remain essential.
